MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Linda Martin.
Attorney Kevin Greenquist appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sherlyn Thomas is present.
Attorney Nicolet E. Corliss representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of June 3, 2013 vacated. (501/JPT)
